content: The 2012 Nobel Prize in Chemistry was awarded jointly to Robert J. Lefkowitz and Brian K. Kobilka for their work on G-protein-coupled receptors, which are crucial for understanding how cells sense and respond to external chemical signals.
raw_content: The 2012 Nobel Prize in Chemistry was awarded jointly to Robert J. Lefkowitz and Brian K. Kobilka for their work on G-protein-coupled receptors, which are crucial for understanding how cells sense and respond to external chemical signals.
